sections.paragraph:
Original: מכמשׁ מכמשׁ מכמס

Transliteration: mikmâs mikmâsh mikmash

Phonetic: mik-maws'

BDB Definition:

Michmas or Michmash = "hidden"
  1. a city in Benjamin lying near Ramah and approximately 10 miles

Origin: from H3647

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
